name: DeepSeekMath
tagline: Original 7B math model that introduced GRPO reinforcement learning for chain-of-thought math.
metaDescription: DeepSeekMath (DeepSeek), released 2024-04 — part of the DeepSeek Math line. Original 7B math model that introduced GRPO reinforcement learning for chain-of-tho…
overview: DeepSeekMath is a large language model from DeepSeek, part of the DeepSeek Math line. Released 2024-04. Math-reasoning line; the latest V2 trains a verifier-guided self-checking prover that reaches IMO/CMO gold level.
What's notable in this version: Original 7B math model that introduced GRPO reinforcement learning for chain-of-thought math.
